description_long: This is a set of three freestanding wooden shelving units, each featuring four open shelves and a lower section with two drawers. The shelves are supported by vertical posts with decorative finials at the top, and the wood has a warm, medium-brown finish. The drawers at the base are equipped with metal handles, adding both functionality and a touch of classic style. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for various items. The construction appears sturdy, with solid wood panels and visible joinery. The overall design is traditional, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as shops, cafes, or residential entryways.
description: A set of three traditional wooden shelving units with four open shelves and two lower drawers, featuring decorative posts and metal handles. The design is sturdy and classic, ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves and two drawers with metal handles on each unit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the vertical posts with finials.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels and the overall structure of the shelving units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shelves' thickness and the decorative side details.
